title: Authoritative command and job protocol vertical slice design
summary: Design the reviewed Worker/player command contract for the first playable lamp/build vertical slice without UI-owned world mutation or save/protocol ambiguity.
acceptance: Reviewed command/protocol design covers the first playable lamp-priority and simple-build command slice, including command payloads, result payloads, rejection reasons and read-model projection requirements
Design preserves Simulation Worker authority and forbids React/Pixi/Electron from mutating world state directly
Design records save/replay/determinism and schema/versioning implications, including whether an ADR or migration is required before implementation
Design defines structured blocked reasons for missing resource, no path, no worker, invalid target, stale command and rule/policy denial
No implementation code is changed unless the task packet is explicitly expanded and reviewed before claim
forbiddenPaths: product implementation code without an approved expanded packet
weakening Simulation Worker authority or deterministic replay requirements
